failedAssertions.reason: Expected HTTP 400 with matching error contract.
History date validation did not match contract.
Ticker pagination/default size did not match contract.
Holding chart empty-state contract did not match.
Required CI lint gate is missing from .github/workflows/test.yml, so CI cannot enforce lint before later steps.
Coverage thresholds are all zero, CI does not run a coverage-mode command, and local coverage execution fails due to missing @vitest/coverage-v8.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not identify any existing eth pool from GET /onchain/networks/eth/pools?page=1 to exercise a non-constituent token filter against the real surface.
